field.name: team_number
field.label: Team Number
field.description: The team number within the club (e.g., 1 for first team, 2 for second team)

field.name: season_id
field.label: Season
field.description: The season this team competes in
field.query: SELECT id AS value, CONCAT(IF(label != '', CONCAT(label, ' '), ''), start_year, '/', LPAD(MOD(start_year + 1, 100), 2, '0')) AS text FROM #__ttclub_seasons WHERE published = 1 ORDER BY start_year DESC, label ASC

field.name: league_id
field.label: League
field.description: The league this team plays in. Cannot be changed after creation.
field.query: SELECT id AS value, name AS text FROM #__ttclub_leagues WHERE published = 1 ORDER BY name ASC

field.name: age_class_id
field.label: Age Class
field.description: The age class this team belongs to
field.query: SELECT id AS value, name AS text FROM #__ttclub_age_classes WHERE published = 1 ORDER BY name ASC
